capabilities.name: Authentication and API keys
capabilities.summary: Create, list, delete, and exchange API keys for bearer tokens.

capabilities.name: Projects and access control
capabilities.summary: Create projects, list projects, and share projects with users or groups.

capabilities.name: Datasets
capabilities.summary: Upload, version, query, extend, download, and share evaluation datasets.

capabilities.name: Experiments
capabilities.summary: Create batch evaluation runs, attach datasets and scorers, query results, and compare metrics.

capabilities.name: Scorers and metrics
capabilities.summary: Create preset, Luna, LLM, and code scorers; validate scorer versions; list scorer health scores.

capabilities.name: Log streams and observability
capabilities.summary: Create production log streams, attach metrics, ingest traces, and query scored runtime traffic.

capabilities.name: Traces, sessions, and spans
capabilities.summary: Log, update, search, aggregate, count, export, and delete trace data.

capabilities.name: Integrations
capabilities.summary: Configure LLM and data integrations including OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, Azure, Vertex, Databricks, Mistral, NVIDIA, Writer, and custom endpoints.

capabilities.name: Feedback and annotations
capabilities.summary: Create feedback and annotation templates and apply human ratings to traces or log records.

capabilities.name: Trends dashboards
capabilities.summary: Create and manage dashboard widgets and sections for log stream trends.

capabilities.name: Agent Control and runtime guardrails
capabilities.summary: Invoke runtime checks using staged rulesets; current docs point new work to Agent Control while the legacy Protect endpoint remains available.
